text.message: Sorry can’t do without solo someone
black we can do this all day
If I 7 out it’s for nothing and the trade doesn’t action me
i wont do it in your turn
Yeah 2:2 keeps me at 8 and also doesn’t action
Maybe when more cards roll we can figure out a deal that works for us both
youre not getting trades here lol
Blue needs road now, can’t have red double play
have a grain port and 2 wood
The 10 doesn’t hurt u as bad as it hurts red tho
Let’s be careful oj is on 5 with 3 devs and 1 knight for army
and a 9 roll wins for you
I don’t have a vp fyi
Orange just rolled a city man
Why are you tunneling on me
blacks got a yop or rb
ahah dude why would he plow me
4 is also a winning roll for oj
i just told  you its not
with that mono you could plow OJ
i told you it was the 9
you let us doing the dirty work
